sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports feeling fatigued and experiencing occasional thirst. He states his blood sugar has been higher than usual recently. The patient is currently taking metformin 100mg daily.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure is 130/80 mmHg. Heart rate is 72 bpm and regular. Physical exam is unremarkable.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient's symptoms and recent A1c level suggest hyperglycemia.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Order a fasting blood glucose test. Adjust metformin dosage as needed based on test results. Schedule follow-up in 2 weeks to assess response to treatment.
